title: Context Engineering and Repository Grounding · Failure Case: Conflict Resolution
summary: Ground an agent in a large unfamiliar repository without flooding its context. Planned artifact: Add and verify the prompt conflict resolution increment in a repository context map and retrieval plan. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Detect conflicting instructions and evidence and apply a documented precedence rule.
Separate one-turn constraints from durable repository instructions such as AGENTS.md or CLAUDE.md.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
